results.title: Bank of Baroda Launches Second Phygital Branch in Hyderabad
results.description: Bank of Baroda expands its banking network with the inauguration of its second Phygital Branch in Hyderabad City, offering digital banking and personalized services.

results.title: Emirates to double its A350 operations in Colombo from August
results.description: Emirates will introduce a second daily A350 service between Dubai and Colombo from 8 August, further elevating the travel experience for customers with more options to experience the airline’s latest-generation aircraft and its highly sought-after Premium Economy cabin. The A350 aircraft will replace the current Boeing 777 aircraft operating the flight. The deployment of the [...]

results.title: Sweden plans to fine companies with frustratingly poor customer service
results.description: Many people will likely recognise the frustration of getting stuck in a long phone queue or a loop with a chatbot when trying to cancel a subscription or get help resolving an issue. But what if they could be fined?

results.title: NeedCover names co-founder Grant Elliott as head of distribution
results.description: The former MGA executive joins the newly launched network to lead its broker recruitment drive as it scales its authorised representative model across Australia.
